---
title: "Accounts Overview"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: 
  md_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Load libraries
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(here)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(fontawesome)
library(knitr)
library(formattable)
library(htmltools)
library(webshot)
library(googledrive)

# filepaths
data   <- here("01_Data")
inter  <- here("02_Intermediate")
output <- here("03_Output")
prog   <- here("04_Programs")

#source(file.path(prog, "01_data_prep_live.R"))
source(here("scripts", "config.R"))
balance <- readRDS(file.path(inter, "balance.RDS"))
# webshot::install_phantomjs()  # run once locally, or via GitHub Actions

googledrive::drive_auth(path = here(google_json_path))
```


```{r, echo=FALSE, message = FALSE}

dates_clean <- balance %>% 
  mutate(miss = as.numeric(is.na(value_usd))) %>%
  group_by(date)%>%
  mutate(miss_date = max(miss))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(miss_date == 0) %>%
  pull(date) %>% unique()

# most recent account balance/value 
current_balance <- balance %>% 
  filter(date == dates_clean[1]) %>% 
  select(date, name, account_subtype, value_current = value_usd) %>% 
  arrange(desc(value_current))

# previous month account balance/value
previous_balance <- balance %>% 
  filter(date == dates_clean[2]) %>% 
  select(name, account_subtype, value_previous = value_usd) %>% 
  arrange(desc(value_previous))

balance_metric_curr <- current_balance %>% 
  left_join(previous_balance, by = c("name", "account_subtype")) %>% 
  adorn_totals() %>%
  mutate(
    diff = value_current - value_previous,
    delta = if_else(account_subtype == "credit card",  
                    round((value_current - value_previous)/value_current * 100),
                    round((abs(value_current) - abs(value_previous))/abs(value_current) * 100)),
    change = paste0(round(diff, 2), " (", delta, "%)")) 

table <- balance_metric_curr %>% 
  mutate(
    icon = ifelse(diff>0, fa(name = "circle-up", fill = "green"), 
                  ifelse(diff < 0, fa(name = "circle-down", fill = "red"), "")),
    "Since Yday" = paste0(icon, change)
    ) %>% 
  mutate(
    value_current = scales::dollar(value_current)) %>% 
  rename("Value ($)" = value_current) %>% 
  select(-value_previous, -diff, -delta, -icon, -date, -change) %>% 
  formattable()

export_formattable <- function(f, file, width = "100%", height = NULL, 
                               background = "white", delay = 0.2)
    {
      w <- as.htmlwidget(f, width = width, height = height)
      path <- html_print(w, background = background, viewer = NULL)
      url <- paste0("file:///", gsub("\\\\", "/", normalizePath(path)))
      Sys.setenv(OPENSSL_CONF="/dev/null")
      webshot(url,
              file = file,
              selector = ".formattable_widget",
              delay = delay)
    }

googledrive::drive_update(file = "test.png", media = export_formattable(table, "table.png"))

```
![Overview of changes since yesterday](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d/16rgdquLqs2wv_jZ5s7CW68wGczWAPpPW) 

For more detail, look here: https://personal-finances.pages.dev/
Review of stocks in portfolio: https://stock-analysis-c6j.pages.dev/ 
StockScanner: https://stock-scanner.pages.dev/
